data.title: News Corporation Announces Changes in Beneficial Ownership
data.description:
An announcement from News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh ( (AU:NWS) ) is now available.

News Corporation has filed a Form 4 with the Securities and Exchange Commission, indicating changes in beneficial ownership of its Class A common stock. This filing reflects the acquisition and subsequent disposal of shares by a director, highlighting ongoing adjustments in the company’s equity structure, which may impact its market dynamics and investor relations.

More about News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh

News Corporation is a global, diversified media and information services company that focuses on creating and distributing authoritative and engaging content. The company operates across various media sectors, including information services and news, digital real estate services, book publishing, and subscription video services, primarily in the United States, Australia, and the United Kingdom.

data.title: Magellan Financial Group Announces Cessation of Securities
data.description:
An update from Magellan Financial Group Ltd ( (AU:MFG) ) is now available.

Magellan Financial Group Ltd has announced the cessation of 100,000 ordinary fully paid securities as part of an on-market buy-back, effective April 7, 2025. This strategic move is likely to impact the company’s capital structure, potentially enhancing shareholder value and reflecting confidence in its financial stability.

More about Magellan Financial Group Ltd

Magellan Financial Group Ltd operates in the financial services industry, focusing primarily on investment management. The company is known for offering a range of investment products and services, catering to a global clientele with a focus on delivering superior risk-adjusted returns.

data.title: Ardent Health Partners Expands Board with New Appointment
data.description:
Ardent Health Partners, Inc. ( (ARDT) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, Ardent Health Partners, Inc. announced the expansion of its Board of Directors to 11 members with the appointment of Robert A. DeMichiei, effective April 2, 2025. Mr. DeMichiei, with over 30 years of experience in financial strategy and healthcare operations, is expected to contribute significantly to Ardent’s growth and operational excellence. His extensive background in healthcare finance and board governance, particularly from his tenure at the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center, positions him as a valuable asset to Ardent Health’s strategic direction.

More about Ardent Health Partners, Inc.

Ardent Health (NYSE: ARDT) is a leading provider of healthcare services in growing mid-sized urban communities across the United States. The company focuses on enhancing healthcare accessibility and quality through investments in innovative services and technologies, operating a network of 30 acute care hospitals and 280 sites of care with over 1,800 affiliated providers across six states.

data.title: Eagle Royalties Ltd. Announces Major Drilling Program at AurMac Gold Project
data.description:
Eagle Royalties Ltd. ( (TSE:ER) ) just unveiled an update.

Eagle Royalties Ltd. has announced a 30,000m diamond drilling program at Banyan Gold Corp.’s AurMac project in Yukon, where it holds royalty interests. The program aims to expand and define mineralized zones, particularly in the Airstrip and Powerline areas, and test targets identified through geochemical and geophysical surveys. This development could impact Eagle Royalties’ operations by potentially increasing the value of its royalty interests, thereby enhancing its market positioning and offering potential benefits to stakeholders.

More about Eagle Royalties Ltd.

Eagle Royalties Ltd. is a company with a strong treasury and a diverse portfolio of over 35 royalty interests in western Canada. The company focuses on a wide range of commodities, including critical metals, precious metals, industrial minerals, and diamonds. Its flagship royalty is associated with the AurMac Project in Yukon, operated by Banyan Gold Corp., where it holds royalty interests ranging from 0.5% to 2% on significant portions of the inferred gold resource.

YTD Price Performance: 29.17%

Average Trading Volume: 29,842

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Strathmore Plus Uranium Corp. Announces Board Change and Continues Wyoming Drilling Efforts
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Strathmore Plus Energy ( (TSE:SUU) ).

Strathmore Plus Uranium Corporation announced the resignation of Mr. Jordan Potts from its Board of Directors, acknowledging his significant contributions to the company’s growth. The company plans to continue its exploration and drilling programs in Wyoming, particularly at the Agate and Beaver Rim projects, to further assess and develop uranium resources.

More about Strathmore Plus Energy

Strathmore Plus Uranium Corp. is involved in the uranium industry with three projects in Wyoming: Agate, Beaver Rim, and Night Owl. The company focuses on exploration drilling and aims to develop the Agate project into an ISR mine.

data.title: Carnegie Clean Energy Secures BiMEP Contract for CETO Deployment
data.description:
Carnegie Clean Energy Ltd ( (AU:CCE) ) has issued an update.

Carnegie Clean Energy has signed a contract with the Biscay Marine Energy Platform (BiMEP) to deploy and test its CETO wave energy technology at the BiMEP site in the Basque Country, under the ACHIEVE Programme. This deployment is a significant step in the commercialisation of CETO, designed to achieve key technical and commercial outcomes, and is supported by various European energy programs. The collaboration with BiMEP will provide Carnegie with access to world-class facilities and infrastructure, facilitating the integration of CETO into the energy grid, and is expected to enhance Carnegie’s positioning in the ocean energy industry.

More about Carnegie Clean Energy Ltd

Carnegie Clean Energy is a technology developer specializing in ocean energy technologies aimed at sustainability. The company owns and develops CETO and MoorPower technologies, which harness energy from ocean waves to generate electricity. With a focus on using artificial intelligence and electric machines, Carnegie optimizes its technologies for efficient electricity generation. The company has a notable history in ocean energy and is recognized for its world-leading developments.

Average Trading Volume: 88,593

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.58M

data.title: Franklin Electric Co. CFO Resignation and Interim Appointment
data.description:
Franklin Electric Co ( (FELE) ) has provided an update.

Franklin Electric Co. announced that Jeffery Taylor, the Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, resigned effective March 28, 2025. On the same date, Russell Fleeger, the current Chief Financial Officer of the Water Systems Segment, will take over as the interim Chief Financial Officer. Mr. Fleeger will receive a monthly stipend and an equity grant as part of his new role.

data.title: illimity Bank Sets Strategic Guidelines for 2026-2028
data.description:
illimity Bank SpA ( (IT:ILTY) ) has provided an update.

illimity Bank has approved its Strategic Guidelines for 2026-2028, focusing on credit and investment banking services for SMEs, reducing operating costs, and enhancing non-strategic assets. The bank aims to maintain a solid capital position and achieve significant growth in total assets and net profit by 2028, despite challenges from external economic factors and market shifts. The strategic shift reflects a response to the unpredictable economic environment, including rising interest rates and a decline in the NPE market, prompting illimity to concentrate on areas with greater market potential.

More about illimity Bank SpA

illimity Bank S.p.A., founded in 2019, specializes in offering credit and investment banking services to Italian SMEs, leveraging strong corporate sector expertise and a high digital component. The bank initially focused on corporate credit, NPE investment, and fintech initiatives but has shifted its focus due to changes in the economic landscape.

data.title: Exxon Mobil Previews Q1 2025 Financial Influences
data.description:
Exxon Mobil ( (XOM) ) has issued an update.

Exxon Mobil’s management has provided insights into factors expected to impact the company’s first-quarter 2025 results compared to the fourth quarter of 2024. These factors include market dynamics, planned activities, and seasonal demand patterns, but do not encompass all changes or estimate the earnings for 1Q 2025. The company noted potential effects from changes in liquid and gas prices, industry margins, and timing effects, as well as scheduled maintenance and seasonal factors. The announcement aims to give stakeholders an understanding of anticipated influences on financial outcomes, although it does not account for all adjustments and charges related to industry conditions.

More about Exxon Mobil

Exxon Mobil Corporation operates in the oil and gas industry, focusing on the exploration, production, and sale of crude oil, natural gas, and petroleum products. The company also produces chemical products and specialty products, maintaining a significant presence in both upstream and downstream operations globally.

data.title: Spark New Zealand Announces Quotation of New Securities on ASX
data.description:
Spark New Zealand Limited ( (AU:SPK) ) has provided an update.

Spark New Zealand Limited has announced the application for the quotation of 45,215,268 ordinary fully paid foreign exempt securities on the ASX, effective April 4, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its financial flexibility and expand its presence in the international securities market, potentially increasing its attractiveness to global investors.

More about Spark New Zealand Limited

Spark New Zealand Limited operates in the telecommunications industry, providing a range of services including mobile, broadband, and digital solutions. The company focuses on delivering innovative communication services to both individual consumers and businesses, primarily in the New Zealand market.
